name: vinay-jayanna/vipas-pocs
description: Enterprise-Grade Serverless AI Deployment – Secure, scalable, and serverless AI agents for Vipas.AI. This repo includes Knative-powered AI model execution, Jenkins CI/CD for security compliance, Python static security tests, Streamlit UI for AI agent management, and a private DevPI Python package repository. Optimized for enterprise AI workloads.

name: vinay-jayanna/large-scale-mlflow
description: Large-Scale AI Experiment Tracking for global marketplace of AI Models – A highly scalable, serverless MLflow deployment using Knative & Kubernetes for large-scale AI experimentation. Optimized for LLM fine-tuning, AWS EFS persistent storage, and Locust-based load testing of 10K+ MLflow instances across 150+ Kubernetes nodes.
